title: Caseoh's Paradise
description: Ever wanted a paycheck to paycheck Twitch streamer to chase you? Now it's possible!
body:
## **This mod includes:**
-Caseoh
-Jynxzi
-Sketch
-Caseoh's Pickaxe
-Caseoh's Shovel
-Caseoh's Soul
-Caseoh's Hamburger
-Caseoh's Portrait

### **Caseoh**

Caseoh Spawns randomly in the world and will drop a ''Caseoh Soul'' item when he is killed.

He is slow but has alot of health!

### **Sketch**

Sketch Spawns randomly in the world.

You can tame him with the ''Caseoh's Hamburger'' item.

### **Jynxzi**

Jynxzi Spawns randomly in the world.

He drops 1 ''Caseoh's Hamburger'' item when killed.

### **Caseoh's Soul**

The Caseoh's Soul item is used to craft items like Caseoh's Shovel and Pickaxe.

You can obtain it by killing caseoh.

### **HotDog Pickaxe**

The HotDog Pickaxe is made with the ''Caseoh's Soul'' item and is slighty better then a diamond pickaxe.

### **Caseoh's Shovel**

Caseoh's Pickaxe is made with the ''Caseoh's Soul'' item and is slighty better then a diamond pickaxe.

### **Caseoh's Portrait**

A beautiful painting item of CaseOh. (size: 16x16)

### **Hamburger**

A Hamburger just to tame Sketch.

The item will be dropped when you kill Jynxzi.
# **Leave a follow for more updates! :D**
